docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BENITA SELOR FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT THE 2005 JEEP CHEROKEE INSURED BY DEFENDANT SUSTAINED A "LOSS" AS DEFINED IN THE POLICY, WHEN PLAINTIFF DROVE OVER A POTHOLE ON 1/27/25. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. APPEARING IN COURT FOR THE DEFENDANT IS BENITA SELOR. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
